hyperedges.description: User sends message â†’ ChatUI renders â†’ AIEngine builds prompt with language+persona â†’ Puter AI streams response â†’ Streamed into dynamic bubble

hyperedges.description: Mic button â†’ VoiceEngine captures speech â†’ Speech-to-text â†’ Chat flow â†’ Response â†’ Text-to-speech playback

nodes.label: AIEngine
nodes.description: Multilingual AI brain for jargon simplification and streaming chat with persona-based context

nodes.label: detectLanguage()
nodes.description: Detects user language via heuristic regex or AI call to Claude

nodes.label: buildSystemPrompt()
nodes.description: Constructs system prompt with language instructions, persona context, and jargon explanations

nodes.label: sendMessage()
nodes.description: Sends chat message to Claude Sonnet via Puter with streaming response

nodes.label: detectConfusion()
nodes.description: Detects user confusion signals from message text

nodes.label: getGreeting()
nodes.description: Returns personalized greeting in selected language and persona style

nodes.label: languageInstructions
nodes.description: Language-specific response guidelines for 12 Indian languages + English

nodes.label: personaAnalogies
nodes.description: Persona-specific analogies for kisan, teacher, dukandaar, retired, student

nodes.label: jargonExplanations
nodes.description: Multilingual definitions for FD jargon (tenor, TDS, maturity, premium, etc.)

nodes.label: BookingUI
nodes.description: 5-step guided FD booking flow with goal selection, amount, tenor, details, review

nodes.label: selectGoal()
nodes.description: Handles FD goal selection (education, marriage, emergency, pilgrimage, general)

nodes.label: submitAmountStep()
nodes.description: Validates and persists FD amount (â‚¹1K-â‚¹5L)

nodes.label: renderTenorStep()
nodes.description: Displays tenor options with best bank recommendation and maturity calculation

nodes.label: confirmBookingStep()
nodes.description: Saves booking to Puter KV and shows confirmation receipt

nodes.label: GOALS
nodes.description: FD goal definitions (padhai, shaadi, emergency, teerth, bachat) with emoji and tenor

nodes.label: BookingStorage
nodes.description: Puter KV persistence layer for FD booking data

nodes.label: saveBooking()
nodes.description: Saves booking object to Puter KV and appends ID to booking list

nodes.label: getMyBookings()
nodes.description: Retrieves all user bookings from Puter KV sorted by date

nodes.label: ChatUI
nodes.description: Main chat interface with streaming responses, voice mode, and session persistence

nodes.label: addUserMessage()
nodes.description: Renders user message in chat and persists to session storage

nodes.label: addAssistantMessage()
nodes.description: Renders assistant message with optional speech synthesis

nodes.label: createStreamingBubble()
nodes.description: Creates animating message bubble that updates chunk-by-chunk during streaming

nodes.label: toggleVoiceMode()
nodes.description: Enables/disables voice input and speech output for hands-free chat

nodes.label: startVoiceCapture()
nodes.description: Initiates Puter speech-to-text or browser fallback for voice input

nodes.label: chatHistory
nodes.description: Full conversation history for AI context, persisted in sessionStorage

nodes.label: CompareUI
nodes.description: Interactive FD rate comparison table by tenor and amount

nodes.label: renderComparison()
nodes.description: Renders sorted bank comparison with rates, maturity amounts, and badges

nodes.label: CulturalEngine
nodes.description: Festival-aware alerts and local spending analogies for interest calculations

nodes.label: getFestivalAlert()
nodes.description: Returns cultural alert if FD matures near regional festival

nodes.label: getLocalAnalogy()
nodes.description: Generates interest amount analogy via Claude or fallback (e.g., Netflix months)

nodes.label: FESTIVALS
nodes.description: Festival dates and emoji by language (Diwali, Pongal, Chhath, etc.)

nodes.label: FDData
nodes.description: FD calculator, comparison logic, and live rate refresh from BankBazaar

nodes.label: loadRates()
nodes.description: Loads bank FD rates from local JSON and optionally refreshes from live source

nodes.label: calculateFD()
nodes.description: Simple interest calculator: SI = P Ã— R Ã— T / 100

nodes.label: getComparison()
nodes.description: Returns best/worst/all banks for tenor+amount+senior status

nodes.label: formatINR()
nodes.description: Formats currency in Indian notation (e.g., â‚¹1,00,000)

nodes.label: banksData
nodes.description: Array of 6 banks with FD rates by tenor and senior citizen surcharge

nodes.label: IndexUI
nodes.description: Landing page for language and persona selection with India map visualization

nodes.label: selectLangCode()
nodes.description: Sets selected language from grid, map, or typed input

nodes.label: selectPersona()
nodes.description: Sets selected persona and animates preview update

nodes.label: startApp()
nodes.description: Navigates to chat.html after saving lang+persona to localStorage

nodes.label: renderIndiaMap()
nodes.description: Renders interactive SVG map of India colored by language region

nodes.description: 5 personas (farmer, teacher, shopkeeper, senior, student) with sample analogies

nodes.label: PuterInit
nodes.description: Puter.js SDK initialization and auth caching

nodes.label: waitForPuter()
nodes.description: Loads Puter.js CDN script and waits for SDK availability

nodes.label: ensureAuth()
nodes.description: Ensures user is signed into Puter before AI calls

nodes.label: isSignedInSilent()
nodes.description: Checks auth status with 15s cache to avoid repeated calls

nodes.description: Service worker registration and install prompt lifecycle

nodes.description: Checks if app can be installed via beforeinstallprompt

nodes.label: promptInstall()
nodes.description: Shows OS install prompt for PWA

nodes.description: Multilingual voice input/output via Puter or browser Speech API

nodes.description: Captures voice via puter.ai.speech2txt or Web Speech API

nodes.label: cleanTextForSpeech()
nodes.description: Strips emojis, markdown, and quick-reply formatting for clean speech output

nodes.description: Maps language names to BCP 47 locale codes for speech APIs

nodes.description: Puter AI chat endpoint using Claude Sonnet model

nodes.description: Puter speech-to-text API

nodes.description: Puter text-to-speech API
